name: Vitesse Energy, Inc.
business: Vitesse Energy is an independent energy company focused on owning interests, predominantly as a non-operator, in oil and natural gas wells. It primarily engages in the acquisition, development and production of non-operated oil and natural gas properties in the United States, with core areas in the Williston Basin of North Dakota and Montana.
sellsTo: Oil and natural gas commodity markets

exposures.sentence: We are an independent energy company focused on returning capital to stockholders through owning interests, predominantly as a non-operator, in oil and natural gas wells.

catalysts.event: The Lucero Acquisition closed, acquiring Lucero in an all-stock transaction.
catalysts.sentence: On March 7, 2025, we closed the Lucero Acquisition pursuant to which we acquired Lucero in an all-stock transaction.
